description: align_engines: 2 auth profiles across 2 DIFFERENT handlers (fidelis-edr + fidelis-elevate-network). Each profile's engine trio is merged into one fields block; every engine_group token is renamed to engineGroup (connection field id + engine_mode dropdown key; triggers value + effect id + child id; serializer field_mappings id; including the prefixed plain_fidelis_elevate_network_engine_group variant); engine + engineGroup get create/edit required: true.
